prompt: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a woman with a short black bob haircut standing indoors beside a tall window, partially hidden by sheer linen curtains glowing with warm daylight. She wears a minimalist camel wool overcoat draped loosely over her shoulders with soft oversized tailoring, wide lapels, a single dark button, and a flap pocket, layered over a simple ivory silk camisole. Her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur for anonymity, while one hand gently holds the coat lapel near her chest. Emphasize quiet luxury, The Row-inspired restraint, no logos, no accessories, no bag, no jewelry, just elegant fabric drape and refined proportions. Use a warm beige interior, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, natural window light, subtle film grain, muted neutral palette, high-end magazine photography, vertical composition, waist-up framing, serene contemplative mood.
